Charizard #4 (Pokemon Base Set | Pokemon Cards) prices are based on the historic sales. The prices shown are calculated using our proprietary algorithm.
Historic sales data are completed sales with a buyer and a seller agreeing on a price. We do not factor unsold items into our prices.
